rulings.Case Title: UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC. VS. EAST WEST BANK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 8, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES GRANTED as requested: $118,076 in fees and $1,190 in costs. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC. VS. EAST WEST BANK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 8, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC. Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs DENIED. By this action Plaintiff challenged the foreclosure. The defense of this litigation is an expense necessary to protect Lender's right under the Deed of Trust. The attorneys' fees clauses in the Deed of Trust and the Note are sufficiently broad to encompass this action and this action arises out of/involves a contract containing a broad fee provision. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: UNITED THREE GROUP, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. TRANS PACIFIC NATIONAL BANK, N.A. AS AN ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 8, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT TRANS PACIFIC NATIONAL BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JANET MAK VS. DOUGLAS KOLB ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 8, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT DOUGLAS KOLB, SANDRA ROMANO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer as is not uncertain. Defendant's argument is based on assumptions and conjecture that cannot be addressed by a demurrer. =(501/REQ)
